economic_notes: Three internally restricted capital bylaw funds established: Infrastructure Fund (35%), Capital Fund (30%), Economic Development Fund (35%). Portfolio investments at fair market value $3,869,532. Harrison Hydro LP revenue. BC FN Gaming revenue. St'at'imc (PC) 2011 Trust settlement beneficiary. Construction in progress includes Daycare centre. Greenhouse project completed.
notes: Qualified audit opinion on three grounds: (1) certain funded tangible capital assets including roads, bridges, buildings, water/utility systems not capitalized in prior years; (2) GBE/GBP financial information not available and not accounted for in consolidated statements - six GBEs including TTQ Economic Development Corporation (100%), Takem Ti Qwelsa7 Eco-Resource Corporation (100%), Xa'xtsa Gas Station Ltd. (100%), 1020376 B.C. Ltd (33.33%), Tsetspa7 Forestry Limited Partnership (16.67%), Tsetspa7 Loakam (Logging) Ltd.; (3) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations adopted but no information available for proper determination. Long-term debt total of $3,733,896 includes demand loans ($1,675,811), long-term debt ($349,948), capital lease obligations ($588,442), and CMHC mortgages ($2,118,695). Annual debt service calculated as principal repayments: long-term debt $58,172 + CMHC mortgages $119,868 + demand loans $103,461 + capital lease $67,332 = $348,833. Unrealized gain on portfolio investments of $464,759 recognized through remeasurement. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
